title: Laxmii
tmdbOverview: Aasif's belief in logic and science shatters when he gets possessed by a transgender's ghost.
synopsis: Released in 2020, Laxmii is a horror and comedy film from India. It has a 2.5 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a MA15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
